sections.short-biography: Sent as envoy to Sima Yi to sue for peace but was executed. Sima Yi called him senile.

full_text:
Wang Jian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Jian. Sent as envoy to Sima Yi to sue for peace but was executed. Sima Yi called him senile. Wang Jian was affiliated with Gongsun Yuan. Wang Jian lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
